rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §39.0301 governs security of assessment instruments and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 39.0301. SECURITY IN ADMINISTRATION OF ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: No conflict: the cited rule addresses assessment instrument security, not homestead exemptions or school funding formulas.
